en.text: . comprehended: or, did not admit, or, receive
: power: or, the right, or, privilege
. about: that was two hours before night
unto the governor of the feast
. a multitude: or, from the multitude that was
, which is the sea of Tiberias
to them that were set down
? offend: or, scandalize, or, cause you to stumble
? that: or, without breaking the law of Moses
. of his own: or, from his own will or disposition
, anointed: or, spread the clay upon the eyes of the blind man
of him that hath a devil
. make: or, hold us in suspense
: about: that is, about two miles
, was troubled: Gr. he troubled himself
of them that sat at the table
. without me: or, severed from me
. offended: scandalized or, made to stumble
. his own: or, his own home
. year: year. And Annas sent Christ bound unto Caiaphas the high priest
unto her that kept the door
with the palm of his hand
that they might be taken away
for all there were so many
